title: No Outbreaks
description: Tired of those Zombie Sieges? Let's remove them!
body:
## No Outbreaks!
![You can use my code: theomenden to get 25% off your first month on a server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/06571c95-44fb-4192-87fd-5ec08cd0c08d.webp)
A simple mod to prevent zombie sieges in Minecraft

This mod is a pretty naive implementation that should prevent zombie siege events from happening to your villages.

It creates a custom gamerule that you can configure from the world creation screen too!

- Feel free to include in any project, modpack, etc.
